name: Quality Auditor
description: Audits response quality, completeness, and cost-effectiveness across the entire council pipeline. Computes aggregate rubric scores, evaluates Stage 3 synthesis completeness (structure, headings, conclusion), and reports token usage and cost metrics per model.

provider.organization: Bayer AG — LLM Council Agent Team

skills.name: Rubric Score Audit
skills.description: Aggregates rubric evaluation scores across all criteria and responses. Reports overall quality level: High (≥80%), Moderate (60-80%), or Below-Average (<60%). Flags individual criteria scoring below 50%.
examples: Audit the quality scores for a council session on cardiovascular drug comparisons

skills.name: Synthesis Completeness Check
skills.description: Evaluates Stage 3 chairman output for structural completeness: word count thresholds (200+, 500+), markdown heading presence, bold text structure, and conclusion/summary section detection. Completeness from 0-100%.

skills.name: Cost Efficiency Report
skills.description: Reports total token usage and estimated USD cost across all models in the pipeline. Provides cost-per-model breakdown for budget monitoring.
